package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_trimleft_space_trimspace: `strings.TrimLeft(..., whitespace)` instead of `strings.TrimSpace(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario673Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.TrimSpace(haystack) == needle
}
